---
title: "City of Tigard Oregon Solid Waste Rates Review"
subtitle: "June 2024"
number: 29
image: /images/tigard-or.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Tigard, Oregon"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
{{<video https://www.youtube.com/embed/5J28O_YmN8A?si=SifTy635R3aBbZb6&amp;start=10497>}}
[Report](https://public.destinyhosted.com/tigardocs/2024/CCBSNS/20240611_2357/5547_Tigard_Rate_Review_Report_May_2024_FINAL.pdf)
:::
